texto: Death has been said to be the leveller in that it does not recognize one’s class, race,ethnicity or nationality. Death does not look at the face before it strikes; it pays noattention to one’s beliefs or outlook to issues in life. Death has often been said to beinevitable. So it is glaring that for as long as people are born, people are bound to diesomeday but how man dies is a huge mystery.
explicacao: Citação de Remi Akujobi sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Death has been said to be the leveller in that it does not recognize one’s class, race,ethnicity …” articula educacao, education, vida em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e vida.
